AdaptiveDecisionResponse.description: Never carries `input_snapshot` - that's an internal policy-debugging artifact.
AdaptiveDecisionResponse.title: AdaptiveDecisionResponse

CitationResponse.description: Learner-safe: no `chunk_id`, vector, or raw prompt text.
CitationResponse.title: CitationResponse

DiagnosticStatusResponse.description: A plain point-in-time view of a diagnostic (no re-derived skill summary).
DiagnosticStatusResponse.title: DiagnosticStatusResponse

ExerciseResponse.description: Learner-safe: never carries `explanation` or any option's `is_correct`/`feedback`.
ExerciseResponse.title: ExerciseResponse

IntegrationReadinessResponse.description:
An integration-safe readiness summary - never a database URL, Redis
URL, secret, internal traceback, or learner information.
IntegrationReadinessResponse.title: IntegrationReadinessResponse

LearnerScenarioResponse.description:
Point-in-time, learner-safe view - never carries a future bar,
future-derived metric, rubric score, or `is_correct` flag.
LearnerScenarioResponse.title: LearnerScenarioResponse

LearnerUpdateRequest.description:
PATCH body: display name, daily goal, and preferred language only.
Role and account status can never be changed through this endpoint.
LearnerUpdateRequest.title: LearnerUpdateRequest

ScenarioOptionResponse.description: Learner-safe: never carries a rubric score or `is_correct`.
ScenarioOptionResponse.title: ScenarioOptionResponse

ScenarioOutcomeDirection.description:
The realized direction of a scenario's focal return, past the
documented +-1% "flat" threshold (see
`application.market_scenarios.calculator`).
ScenarioOutcomeDirection.title: ScenarioOutcomeDirection

post.description: The supplied refresh token is immediately invalidated; reusing it afterward revokes every token issued from the same session family.

post.description: Creates a learner profile and a linked local account in one atomic operation, and returns an initial access/refresh token pair.
